title: Dog Lifting Harness,Dog Support Harness Slings for Back Legs,Adjustable Assistance Support Strap for Injured,Disabled,Elderly Dogs (XL)
features: Dog Back Leg Support:This Dog Rear Leg Assist Band is designed for dogs with leg injuries, disabilities, post-operative rehabilitation or weak rear legs. It can be used for daily walks, to assist your dog to cross obstacles when encountering stair steps or steep slopes, and to assist your dog in travelling to and from transport. This dog harness has been improved to ensure that it will not easily shift during walking.

Dog Lifting Harness：The new dog hind leg assist belt has an improved defecation prep slot design with an adjustable velcro belt. Compared to traditional dog harnesses, your dog can defecate without taking off the carrier. Let your pet enjoy a comfortable and convenient outdoor experience!

Sturdy and Durable: These dog carriers are soft, breathable and durable. They not only provide strong support, but also allow your dog to wear them comfortably without rubbing his tummy. They are also resistant to dirt and easy to clean, making them ideal for outdoor walks.

Easy to Wear:The dog chest harness comes with double velcro straps on the back for easy on and off, and offers a variety of adjustment ranges to fit different waist circumferences. In addition, the adjustable straps on both sides and removable handles can meet the needs of different heights and usage scenarios. It can effectively protect your hands and is easy and comfortable to carry.

Multiple sizes: We offer four sizes: S, M, L, and XL. Please carefully measure your pet's waist and leg circumference before purchasing, and consider its weight. Please refer to the size chart to select the most suitable size.
